# KYC Panda - x402 KYC Gate Extension

> KYC gate for x402 payment protocol. Wallet owners verify identity once, then their agents can transact on any KYC-gated x402 endpoint.

## For Client Agents (Buyers)

When you hit an x402 endpoint and get a 402 response with a `kyc-gate` extension, your wallet needs KYC verification.

1. Check KYC status: GET https://kyc-panda.vercel.app/api/verify/{walletAddress}
2. If not verified, start onboarding: POST https://kyc-panda.vercel.app/api/onboard (with SIWX message + signature)
3. The human wallet owner completes KYC at the returned Didit URL
4. Once approved, your SIWX signatures will pass the KYC gate

## For Server Agents (Sellers)

Add KYC requirements to your x402 endpoints using the bouncer library.

1. Import: createKYCGateHook, declareKYCGateExtension
2. Add declareKYCGateExtension({domain, uri}) to your 402 response extensions
3. Use createKYCGateHook() to verify SIWX headers on incoming requests

## API Endpoints

- Check KYC status: GET /api/verify/{address}
- Start KYC onboarding: POST /api/onboard
- Service health: GET /api/health

## Documentation

- Full Skill Guide: https://kyc-panda.vercel.app/skill.md
- API Specification: https://kyc-panda.vercel.app/openapi.json
- OpenAI Plugin: https://kyc-panda.vercel.app/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
